name: formal-methods
description: Formal modeling and hypothesis-driven debugging using Alloy 6 and Dafny. Includes formal-modeling (write, run, and interpret Alloy 6 or Dafny models for state machines, data invariants, API contracts, permission matrices, and business rules — with reconciliation and enforcement-audit workflow) and formal-debugger (structured bug investigation using formal models for hypothesis-driven root cause analysis).
